properties.name: spring.rate-limit.default-requests
properties.description: Default maximum requests per window when no named limit or annotation override applies.

properties.name: spring.rate-limit.default-window-seconds
properties.description: Default window duration in seconds. Defaults to {@code 60} (one minute).

properties.name: spring.rate-limit.enabled
properties.description: Whether rate limiting is enabled. Defaults to {@code true}.

properties.name: spring.rate-limit.key-prefix
properties.description: Redis key namespace prefix prepended to all rate-limit keys. Defaults to {@code "rl:"}.

properties.name: spring.rate-limit.named-limits
properties.description: Named rate-limit configurations. Each entry may be referenced by name via {@link io.github.saumilp.starters.ratelimit.annotation.RateLimit#name()}.
